role: Deputy Head, Supreme Leader's Military Office
bio: Akbar Ebrahimzadeh served as Deputy Head of the [Supreme Leader's Military Office](/orgs/supreme-leaders-military-office) (beit-e rahbari military section), assisting his chief [Mohammad Shirazi](/people/mohammad-shirazi-military) in overseeing [Ali Khamenei](/people/ali-khamenei)'s direct military staff. He was killed on 28 February 2026 in the combined US-Israel decapitation strikes as part of the [February 28, 2026 strikes](/events/israeli-strikes-iran-feb-2026).
editorial_notes: Deputy Head of Supreme Leader's Military Office. Killed 28 Feb 2026.
